title: Passive isolation flap valve modelling tool
author: Grégoire, Yann
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The files present in the Zenodo repository are given for educational use and research. These files are provided as is and no warranty is provided. They are supplementary material to the publication: Yann Grégoire, Emmanuel Leprette, Christophe Proust, Exploring the Dynamics of Passive Isolation Flap Valves in Dust Explosion Mitigation: A Model-Based Approach and its implications. Process Safety and Environmental Protection, 2024,ISSN 0957-5820, https://doi.org/10.1016/j.psep.2024.02.003. (https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S0957582024001265) The three files in the repository are: • an example input data file: "Input_file_Example.csv" • a Python file (.py) containing the model. • an executable version of this same code, built with auto-py-to-exe ( a Python package published by Brent Vollebregt under an MIT license; see https://pypi.org/project/auto-py-to-exe/)
